name: Why do CNNs excel at feature extraction? A mathematical explanation

description: arXiv:2307.00919v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Over the past decade deep learning has revolutionized the field of computer vision, with convolutional neural network models proving to be very effective for image classification benchmarks. However, a fundamental theoretical questions remain answered: why can they solve discrete image classification tasks that involve feature extraction...
author: Vinoth Nandakumar, Arush Tagade, Tongliang Liu
